title: Enable Multiple Status Selection as Conditions for Automation
excerpt: Users can helpfully filter on “All done labels” but not use “is/is not ‘All done labels’” in an automation. Allowing at least “All done labels” as a condition for automation, and better yet, just allowing users to multip…

posts.author: AdamPruden (apruden@pharmalogistics.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Users can helpfully filter on “All done labels” but not use “is/is not ‘All done labels’” in an automation. Allowing at least “All done labels” as a condition for automation, and better yet, just allowing users to multiple-select statuses for an automation rather than adding multiple criteria would be great.

All Done Labels Filter786×442 38.9 KB
